entries.title: VPN reconnect loop after password rotation
entries.summary: Reset cached credentials, confirm SSO token expiry, and force a fresh tunnel profile download.

blocks.content: User enters new password and the VPN client reconnects every few seconds.
Portal logs show valid MFA but stale cached credentials on the endpoint.
Disconnect the tunnel and clear saved OS credentials for the VPN profile.
Remove the local GlobalProtect app settings cache if the client still loops.
Reconnect and confirm the portal downloads a fresh profile before testing access to internal resources.

entries.title: Outlook shared mailbox opens but search returns no results
entries.summary: Rebuild the local search index only after verifying shared mailbox caching is enabled for the affected profile.

blocks.content: Confirm the mailbox is set to download shared folders, then rebuild Windows Search if indexing is stale.
If the mailbox is accessed through online mode only, Outlook can open content without delivering local instant search results.

entries.title: macOS screenshot permissions block remote support capture
entries.summary: Guide the user through Screen Recording approval and capture a before/after screenshot for the case notes.

blocks.content: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording, enable the remote support tool, then fully quit and relaunch it.
Paste the user-provided screenshot directly into this article to preserve what they saw before the permission reset.
